title: InterfaceDataUnit-3_4 (2026-01-20T10:20:00-0500)
description: An agreed way of communication among SPEDS layers Session (3) and Transport (4).

context.description: The context shared between these two SPEDS layers. This is the ICI (Interface Control Information), i.e. an information passed across an interface to coordinate interactions between two adjacent layers.

source_code.description: The source entity code (a Lodad GUID)

destination_code.description: The destination entity code (a Lodad GUID)

source_iri.description: The source entity IRI (according to RFC3987).

service.description: The service call from the initiating layer

service_primitive.description: The service primitive used to communicate among the layers.

destination_iri.description: The destination entity IRI (according to RFC3987).

options.description: The options shared between the layers.

message.description: The message shared between these two SPEDS layers. This is the SPDU : the PDU (Protocol Data Unit) of the Session layer (3).
